prompt: We've settled on the new direction: indigo #6366F1 as the accent and 6px corner radius everywhere. The docs in this repo are stale — update our durable docs (CLAUDE.md and whatever else shapes direction) so they match where we're actually headed.
assertions: CLAUDE.md Design Standards now states indigo #6366F1 and 6px radius
CLAUDE.md sections outside Design Standards are unchanged (surgical edit, no reorganization or rewording of unrelated content)

The historical change brief (design/change-brief-2026-03.md) is not rewritten to say something new — it is left intact, superseded with a note, or retired reversibly, with its original content preserved

Token/config files (tailwind.config.js, styles/globals.css) are either left unchanged or the change is explicitly called out as executable canon that restyles the product (opt-in, not silently bundled)
A record of the rulings/changes is written (e.g. _canon-check/<date>/update-log.md) listing what changed and why
The final chat summary states which documents now carry the new direction and what, if anything, was left open
